hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *".env"*|*"credentials"*|*"secret"*|*".key"*|*".pem"*) echo 'BLOCK: Do not modify sensitive files (.env, credentials, secrets, keys)' && exit 2;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *"pnpm-lock.yaml"*) echo 'BLOCK: Do not manually edit the lock file — use pnpm install' && exit 2;; esac

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); case "$FILE" in *.js|*.ts|*.vue) cd /Users/peterdemirdjian/repos/pdemirdjian/peterdemirdjiancom && pnpm exec eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
